description: All 4 FX pools on the canonical shape: shared SharedFxVault (per-pool junior allocation) + vault-backed FxSwapHooks priced by consolidated FxOracleV2 (Pyth + MXN inversion + Chainlink manual CAD). Legacy self-custody pools redeemed; first vault-backed EURC hook (0x72aEa3) retired/deallowed.

cadFeedKeeper.guards: publishAge<60s, conf<50bps, sanity 0.5–1.0 CAD/USD, max step 5% vs on-chain; CRON_SECRET bearer auth
cadFeedKeeper.note: ManualPriceFeed stales at FxOracleV2 chainlinkMaxAge=3600s; 10-min cron gives 6x margin. KEEPER needs native-USDC gas on Arc. Retire when a native CAD push feed exists.

notes: Vault per-pool allocation (Codex HIGH#1) + hardened (steal-window guard, idempotent migrate, pre-credit cap snapshot). FxOracleV2 admin=KEEPER. CANARY: admin==timelock==KEEPER (mainnet → real TimelockController + timelock allowHook per Codex HIGH#2). NEXT: Envio + app repoint (off-chain) from retired hooks → these 4 V2 hooks; ~85-LOC dead-Morpho cleanup in FxSwapHook.
